分析快3大小规律破解图【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238909182_63090109<br>vk.com/topic-238865064_62484116<br>vk.com/topic-238909183_62715943<br>vk.com/topic-238909178_62983599<br>vk.com/topic-238909189_63295419<br>vk.com/topic-238909172_63090130<br>vk.com/topic-238909187_63931932<br>vk.com/topic-238832532_63090147<br>vk.com/topic-238909185_62399631<br>vk.com/topic-238909175_62399626<br>vk.com/topic-238909179_63295492<br>vk.com/topic-238909184_62484206<br>vk.com/topic-238909196_62841957<br>vk.com/topic-238881989_63295664<br>vk.com/topic-238855637_63932101<br>vk.com/topic-238834602_63090352<br>vk.com/topic-238883641_64146277<br>vk.com/topic-238909180_63602409<br>vk.com/topic-238877383_62716254<br>vk.com/topic-238909207_63932329<br>vk.com/topic-238909190_63602520<br>vk.com/topic-238832863_62716442<br>vk.com/topic-238832532_63090832<br>vk.com/topic-238909174_62484735<br>vk.com/topic-238909183_62716500<br>vk.com/topic-238909178_62984117<br>vk.com/topic-238865064_62484767<br>vk.com/topic-238909172_63090825<br>vk.com/topic-238897971_64146714<br>vk.com/topic-238909185_62400187<br>vk.com/topic-238881989_63296182<br>vk.com/topic-238909186_62842610<br>vk.com/topic-238909173_62716566<br>vk.com/t
